heading: Coordination with the Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act
label: 3056i Coordination with the Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 3056i, , as added , , , provided that assistance under this subchapter was not financial assistance described in , prior to the general amendment of this subchapter by . Amendments2016— substituted “Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act” for “Workforce Investment Act of 1998” in section catchline.Pub. L. 114–1442014—Subsec. (a). , substituted “Grantees under this subchapter shall be one-stop partners as described in subparagraphs (A) and (B)(v) of section 121(b)(1) of the Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act in the one-stop delivery system established under section 121(e) of such Act for the appropriate local workforce development areas” for “Grantees under this subchapter shall be one-stop partners as described in subparagraphs (A) and (B)(vi) of section 121(b)(1) of the Workforce Investment Act of 1998 () in the one-stop delivery system established under section 134(c) of such Act () for the appropriate local workforce investment areas”.Pub. L. 113–128, § 512(w)(7)(A)29 U.S.C. 2841(b)(1)29 U.S.C. 2864(c)Subsec. (b)(2). , substituted “be signatories of the memorandum of understanding established under section 121(c) of the Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act” for “be signatories of the memorandum of understanding established under section 121(c) of the Workforce Investment Act of 1998 ()”.Pub. L. 113–128, § 512(w)(7)(B)29 U.S.C. 2841(c)

children.heading: Partners
children.label: a Partners
children.text: Grantees under this subchapter shall be one-stop partners as described in subparagraphs (A) and (B)(v) of section 121(b)(1) of the Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act [] in the one-stop delivery system established under section 121(e) of such Act [] for the appropriate local workforce development areas, and shall carry out the responsibilities relating to such partners.29 U.S.C. 3151(b)(1)29 U.S.C. 3151(e)
coordinate their activities related to the one-stop delivery systems; and
be signatories of the memorandum of understanding established under section 121(c) of the Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act [].29 U.S.C. 3151(c)
